title: Detour's VANILLA PLUS EDITION Mansions
description: "Detour's VANILLA PLUS EDITION Mansions" is a datapack that changes every woodland mansion room to either entirely remake it or change the room to make it better.
body:
Detour's VANILLA PLUS EDITION Mansions is a datapack that aims to make the woodland mansion a better experience by changing every room, changing and adding loot tables to both chests and mobs, adding unique spawnrates for mobs within the mansion. (adding higher witch spawns  also making pillagers able to spawn), adding small bits of archaeology within certain rooms and changing the roof to have a garden on top.

It does changes loot tables to illagers making pillagers drop arrows and evoker not drop totems outside mansions (they drop enchantment books instead) so if you wish to remove that you can go into "Detour VANILLA PLUS EDITION Mansions>data>minecraft>loot_tables>entities" then remove all the files within that folder.

also Thanks Ewan Howell for the title generator thing for block bench
